findings: SKILL.md and README align on explicit metaswarm shape, child telemetry files, and partial-not-silent-downgrade policy.
Documentation mismatch: SKILL.md default model is claude-sonnet-4.5 while README says claude-haiku-4.5.
Documentation mismatch: SKILL.md caps agents at 8 while README advertises up to 20.
Checklist path mismatch: SKILL.md references ~/.stampede/agents for worker install, but README documents ~/.copilot/agents.
